assumptions.note: Server tick uses 0.015 * mleo_mult * bank_bonus * mleo_gain_mult. Client refinery uses 0.0165 — sim uses SERVER.
assumptions.progression: Refinery/blueprint/logistics/crew scale with sqrt(day) and archetype reinvest; research gates approximate sql/base_server_authority.sql boolean bonuses.
assumptions.activity: effectiveSeconds = activeMinutes * 60 * managementQuality; no separate offline tick merge (conservative).
assumptions.expeditions: Poisson-ish mean expeditionPerDay with expected banked MLEO from expedition RPC shape.

assumptionAudit.ifLiveSlower: milestones move LATER (optimistic vs cap anxiety)

assumptionAudit.desc: crew/hq/miner/research toggles from effective day d
mean expedition count/day × expected banked roll; no DATA gate

assumptionAudit.ifLiveFasterThanModel: better uptime than modeled → EARLIER caps

assumptionAudit.desc: no offline merge into production seconds
assumptionAudit.ifLiveFasterThanModel: if offline adds meaningful MLEO → EARLIER

assumptionAudit.desc: not modeled (does not affect mleo_produced_today authority path)
assumptionAudit.ifLiveFasterThanModel: no direct cap effect; vault loop ignored

assumptionAudit.desc: no GOLD/ORE spend; time-based proxy only
assumptionAudit.ifLiveFasterThanModel: if real costs slow upgrades → LATER than sim

engaged_p75.meaning: engaged first reaches 75% of daily cap before this day

grinder_p100.meaning: grinder first full-cap day before this

hardcore_cap_midgame.meaning: any cap day before late window

extreme_p100.meaning: extreme first full-cap day before this

extreme_cap_spam_midgame.meaning: extreme hits cap too often before late game
